creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #1)
I won't be opposed to that. When submitting the patch I was hesitant about claiming maintainership because it seems natural to have one person maintaining both conky and conky-awesome, but as I don't use awesomewm myself, I am not really in a position to make functional promises concerning the latter.
